{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
  Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben:
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Pa√üions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>fl. 2.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>24. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Stahiii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Nouvelie Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>32. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>48. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Hau√ü-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>40. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Corrected the misspelling of the tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for consistency across all entries. 2. Escaped the ampersand character ('&') to '&' in two titles to ensure valid XML syntax. 3. Removed non-semantic decorative symbols (√†) that were floating outside of tags. 4. Cleaned up trailing commas and punctuation that were outside the structured tags. 5. Extracted the content from the JSON string wrapper to provide the raw XML. 6. Standardized indentation for readability. 7. Ensured all tags are properly closed and nested."}
